product_title: Cambridge Audio Azur 851C Upsampling DAC, CD Player & Preamplifier (Black)
product_description: Cambridge Audio Azur 851C DAC/CD Player and Preamp Award-Winning Azur 851C a High-End Triple Threat: Delivers Exemplary Performance as Hub of Your Digital Music System Twin Cutting-Edge DACs from Analog Devices, Innovative ATF2 Upsampling, Asynchronous USB Input, Exceptional Toroidal Transformer: Azur 851C Packed with Audiophile Treats Call it a triple threat. Cambridge Audio's Azur 851C is a high-end CD player, state-of-the-art DAC, and digital preamp in one highly accomplished package. It's designed to beat as the heart of your digital music system, offering incredible functionality and performance. A high-end solution to the demands of today's multi-format music lover with commanding performance that matches products that cost much more, Azur 851C enhances any digital audio that passes through its sophisticated electronics. Despite its staggering complexity, it focuses on one mission: to make your digital music sound sublime. "Impeccably engineered and with sonics the match of most machines at twice the price, what's not to like? Smooth and svelte sounding yet commanding and incisive, only its rivals will regret the advent of this sparkling talented new CD player." – Hi-Fi Choice , CD Player of the Year Award Central to Azur 851C's exceptional performance is a stunning batch of advanced technologies, such as cutting-edge high-specification DACs from the experts at Analog Devices. Together with on-board ATF2 upsampling technology, Azur 851C improves sound quality regardless of the input format. From MP3 to high-res downloads, this award-winning player showcases your music in the best-possible light. You'll experience exemplary precision, dynamics, and refinement. "The [851 Series] now compete with the very best in class when it comes to sound and are pretty much in a league of their own when it comes to features.
product_bullet_point:
A high-end CD player, state-of-the-art DAC, and digital preamp in one highly accomplished package
On-board ATF2 upsampling technology
Casework combines massive structural rigidity, careful damping, and enhanced acoustic-resonance control
Three digital filter options that offer a slightly different aural presentation
Audiophile-grade toroidal transformer

product_title: The Task Ahead, I Can Do All Things, Challenge Coins, Antique Gold Plated, Featuring a Kneeling Knight Templar and Philippians 4:14
product_description:
The Task Ahead Challenge Coin

This high quality, antique gold-plated challenge coin is an excellent token of faith to carry with you, or to pass along to those in need of encouragement.

This coin is meant to serve as reminder that our strength comes from the Lord, and that he is stronger than any trial or tribulation that lies ahead of us. No challenge is too great for those that rely on the Almighty!

This Kneeling Knight challenge coin is a perfect tool to serve as a subtle reminder of faith. Great to keep in a pocket, purse, or backpack to carry the Joy of the Lord with you wherever you go, or put it on display on any table or desktop.

Carefully and exquisitely designed, this Bible verse challenge coin makes the perfect gift or token of encouragement to pass out to friends or family. Make someone's day with a simple, kind gesture and a small gift. Also a great tool for bulk teaching aids and object lessons at church, school, small groups, youth groups, and Bible studies.

This Christian Templar coin comes in gift-ready packaging. Makes for the perfect present as a token of gratitude, appreciation, or encouragement. Remind someone that they are not alone, and that there is a God who loves them.

Details

Front: a kneeling knight with sword, with text "Greater is he who is in you than he who is in the world. 1 John 4:4"

Back: a shield with cross, with text "I can do all things through Christ who gives me strength. Philippians 4:13"

Size: 1.75"

product_description:
CO2 inflator by BriskMore

Our CO2 inflator is the optimal choice whether used for personal or professional purposes.
The easy to use adjustable valve affords precise pressure control for inflation.
Perfect for both Presta and Schrader valves with no alterations required.

Instruction for Use:

1. Ensure control valve is closed lightly.

2. Screw the cartridge into the inflator head.

3. Place the inflator head onto the tire ‘s valve.

4. Open the control valve to inflate the tire.

5. Close the control valve and remove the inflator head.

6. Remove empty CO2 canister from inflator.

***Safety Precautions:

During use, please be aware of both the cartridge and inflator head, as they will become very cold. It is recommended to wear gloves when operating the CO2 inflator.
Care should be taken during operation and removal. Do not exceed tire’s maximum air pressure. Hold the CO2 inflator and point inflator head away from the body and face. Keep away from the reach of children.

product_description: Brand MCM has always remained true to its original philosophy—even while experiencing significant growth in recent years. By emphasizing innovation, originality, quality and value MCM has refined its vision to earn worldwide recognition. Contemporary optical design, unparalleled craftsmanship, outstanding warranty, and superior customer care defines MCM. MCM has made the ascent from humble beginnings to its present position: a worldwide leader in affordable luxury eyewear. MCM uses state-of-the-art materials to craft their signature eyewear frames: premium cellulose acetate, ultra-lightweight titanium, and color-rich stainless steel. MCM eyeglasses include demo lenses with Brand logo etched into the lens. These demo lenses are designed to imitate the real look of a prescription eyewear as close as possible to a traditional l prescription lens. Demo lenses can’t be worn simply as a fashion statement. product_title: Pregmate 50 Pregnancy Test Strips (50 Count)
product_description:
Pregmate pregnancy tests measure the levels of the pregnancy hormone in urine. This hormone is produced by the cells of the embryo that will later form the placenta. The level of hormone starts to increase from its basal level of less than 5 miu/ml directly after implantation and doubles about each 48 hours during the first weeks of pregnancy.

Directions:
Dip the strip into the urine for 3-5 seconds.
Lay the strip flat.
Read results in 5 minutes.

Reading the results:
Positive (Pregnant): Two lines mean the test is positive and you are pregnant. The color intensity of the lines may vary since different stages of pregnancy have different concentrations of hormone. The hormone level increases as your pregnancy progresses.
Negative (Not Pregnant): One line means the test is negative and you are not pregnant.

Did you know?
The average implantation time is 9 days past ovulation. It takes two or three days after implantation for the embryo to make enough hormone for a home pregnancy test to work. So that means the majority of women won't get a positive until 11 days past ovulation. We do instruct to test the day your next period is supposed to begin, or after, to ensure the hormone has enough time to build up. Some women are able to test 4-7 days before their missed period, however, a majority of women will not have the minimum amount of hormone present in an early pregnancy to accurately test.

The accuracy of home pregnancy test results varies from woman to woman. Each woman ovulates at a different time in her menstrual cycle. Plus, the fertilized egg can implant in a woman's uterus at different times. If you want to test as early as possible, but want to make sure you’re getting the most accurate result, test the day your next period is supposed to begin - you will have a 99% chance of getting an accurate reading.

product_title: Kiehl's Facial Fuel Energizing Moisture Treatment for Men 4.2 fl.oz 125 ml
product_description:
Kiehl's
Facial Fuel Energizing Moisturizer for Men
Size: 4.2 fl oz/ 125 mL

An energizing, non-greasy men’s face moisturizer. Paraben-free & sulfate-free. Good for all Skin Types, including Sensitive Skin.

Key Ingredients

Chestnut Extracts - derived from the Sweet Chestnut Tree native to Europe and Asia. This extract contains antioxidants that help to effectively neutralize free radicals.

Vitamin C - Vitamin Cg, or Ascorbyl Glucoside, is a Vitamin C derivative. With antioxidant benefits, this form of Vitamin C is known to help boost radiance and smooth skin texture.

Caffeine- an alkaloid known for its stimulating properties. In our formulas, it helps energize and reduce dullness.

How To Use

- Apply our men’s face moisturizer to clean fingertips and massaging into face.

- Can be used morning and night.

- Explore our other skincare products like our energizing face wash, our eye cream for men and our SPF moisturizer.

- Discover our ultimate men’s skincare routine for healthy-looking skin.

This product is free of parabens and it also comes in recyclable packaging.
product_bullet_point:
RE-ENERGIZES AND REVIVES: This men’s facial moisturizer re-energizes and revives fatigued, dull skin. It invigorates men’s skin for a healthy appearance.
ANTIOXIDANT PROTECTION: It is formulated with Caffeine and Vitamin C. This men’s face cream provides antioxidant protection in addition to softening and hydrating skin so it revitalizes the complexion for a healthy look and feels.
FAST ABSORBING: The lotion absorbs quickly and leaves no residue so you can smooth on non-greasy hydration and experience the fresh scent of our invigorating men’s face moisturizer.
AFTER SHAVE SOLUTION: This moisture treatment for men is a skin care favorite because it is perfect for an aftershave solution since it protects the skin from irritation.
PEACE OF MIND FORMULA: This product is free of parabens and also comes in recyclable packaging.
